# Weekly Menu Rotation Feature Plan

## What This Feature Needs

A weekly menu rotation would allow different menu items to be available on different weeks, cycling through predefined rotations rather than serving the same menu indefinitely.

---

## Modules Involved

### Core Touch Points (High Certainty)

**`src/lib/teacher-club/ordering.ts`** ÔÇö The highest-risk single file
- ├Ś28 imported (2nd most imported in codebase)
- Complexity 0.49, 692L, actively churning (12 commits, +306/-36)
- Currently handles availability logic ÔÇö rotation schedule logic lives here or branches from here
- **Every change here cascades to 28 consumers**

**`src/lib/teacher-club/ordering-server.ts`** ÔÇö Already exports `PeriodAvailability`
- amp3.6, ├Ś7Ôćĺ25 affected, d4 cascade depth
- `PeriodAvailability` is exactly where rotation-aware availability belongs
- Modifying this triggers 25 downstream files across 4 levels

**`src/app/api/teacher-club/availability/route.ts`** ÔÇö 66L, 0.19 complexity
- Likely the API surface that serves available items to the cart
- Will need rotation-week parameter or derive it server-side

**`/api/teacher-club/menu`** ÔÇö 73L, 0.13 complexity
- Currently serves the static menu ÔÇö needs rotation context added

### Database Layer

**`src/lib/prisma.ts`** ÔÇö ├Ś51 (most imported file in codebase)
- Schema changes needed: new `MenuRotation` or `WeeklyMenu` model
- New prisma migration affects everything that touches `prisma.ts`
- Low direct risk per change, but migration errors are global

**`prisma/` directory** ÔÇö 2 files, 459L
- Schema additions: rotation table, week assignments, item-rotation mapping
- Migration needed before any code changes work

### Menu Cache

**`src/lib/cluster-pos/menu-cache.ts`** ÔÇö amp4.0, ├Ś1Ôćĺ4, exports `clearMenuCache`, `isMenuCacheValid`
- **Critical:** rotation changes must invalidate this cache
- If cache isn't invalidated on week rollover, wrong menu serves indefinitely
- Small file but amplification means touching it affects 4x what it appears

### UI Layer

**`src/app/teacher-club/dashboard/page.tsx`** ÔÇö 412L, 0.50 complexity, 8 commits recently
- Teachers see their upcoming orders here ÔÇö must show rotation-correct menu
- High churn (8 commits) means merge conflicts likely

**`src/components/teacher-club/CartContent.tsx`** ÔÇö 9 commits, +287/-176 recently
- Already receiving `delivery date` when fetching ÔÇö rotation can piggyback on this
- Actively changing; coordinate carefully

**`src/app/teacher-club/menu/page.tsx`** ÔÇö 133L, 0.37 complexity
- The menu display page ÔÇö needs rotation week selector or auto-detection

### Order Processing

**`src/app/api/teacher-club/orders/route.ts`** ÔÇö 741L, **0.89 complexity** (highest in codebase), 20 commits
- Must validate that ordered items belong to the correct rotation week at order time
- Price validation flow already exists ÔÇö rotation validation follows the same pattern
- **Do not modify lightly**

**`src/app/api/cron/process-preorders/route.ts`** ÔÇö 716L, 0.74 complexity
- Processes pre-orders in batches ÔÇö must be rotation-week-aware
- If a pre-order spans a rotation boundary, this needs explicit handling

# Weekly Menu Rotation Feature Plan

## What This Feature Needs

A weekly menu rotation means: different menu items available on different weeks, with teachers seeing the correct menu for their delivery date, orders validated against the right week's menu, and admins able to manage the rotation schedule.

---

## Modules Involved

### **Core Touch Points (High Confidence)**

**`src/lib/teacher-club/ordering.ts`** ÔÇö The highest-risk single file
- ├Ś28 imported (most-imported lib after prisma)
- 692L, complexity 0.49, 12 commits in 30 days (actively churning)
- Currently handles availability logic ÔÇö menu rotation logic belongs here
- Any change cascades to ~28 consumers

**`src/lib/teacher-club/ordering-server.ts`**
- amp3.6, ├Ś7Ôćĺ25 affected, d4 cascade depth
- Exports `PeriodAvailability` ÔÇö this is exactly where weekly period Ôćĺ menu mapping lives
- Modifying this fans out to 25 files at depth 4

**`prisma/schema`** (2 files, 459L)
- Need new tables: `MenuRotation`, `MenuRotationItem` linking weeks to menu items
- Schema changes are zero-blast-radius until migration runs, then infinite

**`src/app/api/teacher-club/menu/route.ts`** (73L, 0.13 complexity)
- Currently simple; needs to accept a `deliveryDate` param and return the rotation-appropriate menu
- Low complexity now, but becomes a critical path

**`src/lib/teacher-club/cart/index`**
- Referenced in the payment flow: `app/api/teacher-club/orders -> lib/teacher-club/cart/index`
- Cart validation must confirm cart items exist in the *week's* menu, not just any menu

### **Validation Layer**

**`src/lib/teacher-club/price-validation`**
- In the payment flow dependency chain
- Prices may vary by rotation week ÔÇö needs rotation awareness or explicit assumption that prices are rotation-invariant

**`src/app/api/teacher-club/orders/route.ts`** (741L, complexity 0.89 ÔÇö highest in codebase)
- 20 commits in 30 days, actively being worked on
- Server-side order validation must reject items not in that week's rotation
- **Do not add rotation logic directly here** ÔÇö extract to ordering.ts instead

### **Admin Interface**

**`src/app/api/admin/menu/route.ts`** and **`/api/admin/menu/[id]`**
- Need new endpoints or extensions: `GET /api/admin/menu/rotations`, `POST /api/admin/menu/rotations`
- Currently 64L and 93L ÔÇö low complexity, safe to extend

**`/admin/menu` and `/admin/menu/[id]/edit` pages**
- Need rotation schedule UI
- 274L and 310L, complexity 0.30-0.35 ÔÇö moderate, manageable

### **Cron Job**

**`src/app/api/cron/process-preorders/route.ts`** (716L, complexity 0.74)
- Second most complex file in the codebase
- Processes pre-orders in batch ÔÇö must resolve which rotation week applies at charge time
- If rotation changes after order placement, this needs a "rotation at time of order" snapshot

### **Menu Cache**

**`src/lib/cluster-pos/menu-cache.ts`** (amp4.0, ├Ś1Ôćĺ4)
- Exports `clearMenuCache`, `isMenuCacheValid`
- Cache invalidation must be rotation-aware ÔÇö cached menu for week N is invalid for week N+1
- Currently no TTL concept tied to weekly boundaries; needs one

### **Frontend**

**`src/components/teacher-club/CartContent.tsx`** (9 commits, actively churning)
- Must display items only valid for the selected delivery week
- Currently receiving delivery date (recent fix: "pass delivery date when fetching pre-order")

**`src/app/teacher-club/dashboard/page.tsx`** (412L, 8 commits)
- Should show "this week's menu" ÔÇö needs rotation context

**`src/app/teacher-club/menu/page.tsx`** (133L)
- Most directly affected UI page
